evals.prompt: Implement an 'OK' button listener in screen space that prints a message when clicked and uses a ScreenTransform to anchor to the bottom right.
evals.expected_output: A script using ScreenTransform and a TouchEvent listener.
expectations: Sets anchors/offsets for bottom-right alignment (e.g., anchorMin = new vec2(1,0))
Creates a 'TouchStartEvent' or uses a 'Button' component event

evals.prompt: Write a script that converts a screen-space tap location (from TapEvent) to a world-space direction vector.
evals.expected_output: A script utilizing the screen-to-world conversion math.
expectations: Uses event.getTapPosition() to get screen coords
